I am not allowed to use custom skills for whatever reason. I am only supposed to use built in skills with Azure.
I need to read .txt files from blob > chunk text > embed text > store on vector db with each chunk as a "document" so I can search accordingly.
I have tried the splitting skill and embedding skill separately and it works fine but when I try to do them together it fails. ID creation is also a problem.
Has someone fixed this before?
